recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Winnie the Pooh
recommendations.overview: During an ordinary day in Hundred Acre Wood, Winnie the Pooh sets out to find some honey. Misinterpreting a note from Christopher Robin, Owl convinces Pooh, Tigger, Rabbit, Piglet, Kanga, Roo, and Eeyore that their young friend has been captured by a

recommendations.title: Trolls Holiday in Harmony
recommendations.overview: Queen Poppy plans the first annual Trolls Kingdom Secret Holiday Gift Swap, but things don't go quite as expected.

recommendations.title: The Ugly Duckling and Me!
recommendations.overview: The Hans Christian Anderson tale gets a new treatment, this time with a rat trying to exploit the talents of a little ugly duckling for profit.

recommendations.title: Event Horizon
recommendations.overview: In 2047, a group of astronauts are sent to investigate and salvage the starship Event Horizon which disappeared mysteriously seven years before on its maiden voyage. However, it soon becomes evident that something sinister resides in its corridors.

recommendations.title: Qwerty
recommendations.overview: A grieving young inventor finds solace in repairing an antique typewriter.

recommendations.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
recommendations.overview: When scientists discover something near Antarctica that appears to be a buried Pyramid, they send a research team out to investigate. Little do they know that they are about to step into a hunting ground where Aliens are grown as sport for the Predat

recommendations.title: Resident Evil
recommendations.overview: When a virus leaks from a top-secret facility, turning all resident researchers into ravenous zombies and their lab animals into mutated hounds from hell, the government sends in an elite military task force to contain the outbreak.

recommendations.title: Monster Hunter
recommendations.overview: A portal transports Cpt. Artemis and an elite unit of soldiers to a strange world where powerful monsters rule with deadly ferocity. Faced with relentless danger, the team encounters a mysterious hunter who may be their only hope to find a way home.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.
